items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
🆕SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Small Shoulder Bag❤
Crafted from black calfskin, interpreting timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde silhouette.
The piece features a practical leather shoulder strap adorned with the classic Serpenti head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, suitable for daily wear. It includes a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an interior quilted pocket, three card slots, a customizable vanity mirror, and is accented with the BULGARI metal logo on the back.
Dimensions: 22 X 15 X 4.5 cm
Model: 292104

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
BVLGARI SERPENTI FOREVER Crossbody Bag
Model: 289676
Dimensions: 19-13-7cm
The new 'Serpenti Forever' crossbody bag highlights urban style and versatile fashion, adding a unique trendy touch to the Serpenti world.
This bag is made of peach-colored calfskin with light gold-plated brass hardware.
Black and white agate enamel and green malachite eyes add a seductive charm to the classic snake-head clasp.
Featuring an adjustable serpentine chain and leather shoulder strap for easy styling with daily outfits.
Small size, two compartments, a delicate customizable vanity mirror, a non-removable credit card holder, an open pocket, a zip pocket, and two external pockets.

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
 【BVLGAR*】💋Serpenti Forever, a new masterpiece for the world 🌝, adding radiance to the Serpenti family and enriching the series. This bag features a white calfskin body, with white agate and pink crystal calfskin on the sides, paired with light gold-plated brass accessories. White and pink enamel paired with black onyx sensual eyes 😊, embellishing the classic snake head clasp with bewitching charm.
The handbag style has three storage compartments and comes with a detachable cocoa adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, offering versatile styling. Small size, zip pocket, with a small makeup mirror. Let you be a delicate girl every moment ❤
size:22.5×18.5×11cm model: 289835

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
The "SERPENTI CABOCHON" series mini shoulder bag features a charming large-scale graphic pattern and bold metallic details, radiating the brilliance of the SERPENTI world with its exquisite, practical design and modern style.
This bag is equipped with an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap, serving as a handbag or clutch to achieve versatile styling suitable for day and night.
Small size, with one storage compartment, one internal zip pocket, and one internal open pocket. Engraved BVLGARI brand logo on the inner metal plate.
Model: 291223
Dimensions: 27×18×11 cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
BVLGARI Serpenti Forever
Model: 35362
Size: 28*19*8cm
Best-selling series from the boutique, original single quality. Serpenti Forever "Double-layer" flap bag. Light gold-plated brass accessories and black and white enamel snake head clasp. Eyes inlaid with green peacock stone. Full copper snake body chain. Two buckle plates and a makeup mirror pocket. Multiple internal layers. Includes "raincoat, mirror, boutique gift box packaging, laser anti-counterfeit label and printed unique code".
